mapper.sql: rorder_no, rorder_item, id, rorder_fno, model_no, quantity, price, price_enduser, eprice, tax_rate, ntax_pice, ntax_amount, tax_amount, amount, discount, dlv_date, cdlv_date, wms_dlv_date, spec_offer_no, source_type, cproduct_no, spec_mark, remark, product_name, opponent, ppl_no, project_no, group_customer_no, shikomi_no, sales_info_no, pre_sales_order_no, corder_no, custom_code, order_type, status, delete_status, stock_code, stock_type, inventory_type_code, prod_flag, allot_time, ready_time, exp_time, ship_time, ready_qty, exp_qty, returned_qty, address_no, process_date, borrow_no, po_qty, exp_msg, exp_dlv_type, exp_link_no, invoiceGroupKey, invoice_qty, invoice_time, carrierId, expressNo, handover_time, version, create_time, update_time, update_user, create_user, price_user, intercept, intercept_time, industryId, customerType, expected_delivery_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.rcvdetail_copy
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.rcvdetail_copy (rorder_no, rorder_item, id, rorder_fno, model_no, quantity, price, price_enduser, eprice, tax_rate, ntax_pice, ntax_amount, tax_amount, amount, discount, update dbo.rcvdetail_copy
rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_item = #{record.rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
rorder_fno = #{record.rorderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_enduser = #{record.priceEnduser,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
eprice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tax_rate = #{record.taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ntax_pice = #{record.ntaxPice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ntax_amount = #{record.ntaxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tax_amount = #{record.taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dlv_date = #{record.dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cdlv_date = #{record.cdlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
wms_dlv_date = #{record.wmsDlvDate,jdbcType=DATE},
spec_offer_no = #{record.specOfferNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source_type = #{record.sourceType,jdbcType=CHAR},
cproduct_no = #{record.cproductNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
spec_mark = #{record.specMark,jdbcType=CHAR},

pre_sales_order_no = #{record.preSalesOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
corder_no = #{record.corderNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
custom_code = #{record.customCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
delete_status = #{record.deleteStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
stock_code = #{record.stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stock_type = #{record.stockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prod_flag = #{record.prodFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
allot_time = #{record.allotTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ready_time = #{record.readyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
exp_time = #{record.expTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ship_time = #{record.shipTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ready_qty = #{record.readyQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exp_qty = #{record.expQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
returned_qty = #{record.returnedQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
address_no = #{record.addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
process_date = #{record.processDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
borrow_no = #{record.borrowNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_qty = #{record.poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exp_msg = #{record.expMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exp_dlv_type = #{record.expDlvType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exp_link_no = #{record.expLinkNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoiceGroupKey = #{record.invoicegroupkey,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
invoice_qty = #{record.invoiceQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_time = #{record.invoiceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price_user = #{record.priceUser,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
intercept = #{record.intercept,jdbcType=BIT},
intercept_time = #{record.interceptTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
industryId = #{record.industryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerType = #{record.customertype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expected_delivery_time = #{record.expectedDeliveryTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

intercept_time = #{interceptTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
industryId = #{industryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerType = #{customertype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expected_delivery_time = #{expectedDeliveryTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and rorder_item = #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}
